# Blocked High-Level Design

This document is intentionally blocked. It is present only to make the final package shape explicit while `high-level-design.json` records `design_status=blocked`.

The source contract is `contract-envelope.json`. The Agent PRD is not execution-ready, so no implementation-ready HLD may be written. The package must keep the HLD blocked until the missing execution facts are resolved and the Human PRD review gate is approved.

Relevant blocking refs are recorded in `high-level-design.json`, including `Q-001`, required execution refs, and the blocked design gate. This document does not add architecture, interface, data-flow, control-flow, or acceptance facts.
